---
title: ""
date-modified: last-modified
date-format: "DD-MM-YYYY"
---

# Platforms

At the Psychology Department at Wrexham University, we are committed to the values of Open Science. Following the practices set out by the [Open Science Framework (OSF)](https://osf.io/) , we aim to make our teaching, research, and experimental resources accessible to both students and the wider scientific community.

This section provides open access materials that you can freely view, use, and adapt:

-   [Gorilla Open Materials](https://app.gorilla.sc/openmaterials/1112705) – Example experiments, task templates, surveys (English and Welsh) and teaching resources created using [Gorilla Experiment Builder](https://gorilla.sc/).
-   [Open Day Materials](https://github.com/WU-Psychology-Technician/Open-Day-Practicals) – Public engagement resources, activities, and handouts from departmental open days.
-   [Experimental Materials](https://github.com/WU-Psychology-Technician) – Experimental code for studies, specific equipment, and technologies will be stored here via [GitHub](https://github.com/).

By sharing these resources openly, we hope to encourage *transparency*, *collaboration*, and *innovation* in the psychological sciences.

## What We Offer
::::::::::::: {.grid style="grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr)); gap: 1.5rem;"}
:::: card
::: card-body
<h3 class="card-title">
[**OSF**](https://osf.io/)
</h3>
<p>Start using the open source framework (OSF) to begin your journey as a 21st century scientist! </p>
<img src="../images/OSF-teal.png" 
     alt="PsyTech Icon" 
     style="width: 210px; 
            display: block; 
            margin-left: 70px;
            margin-top: 0px;
            margin-bottom: 0.05rem;">
:::
::::
:::: card
::: card-body
<h3 class="card-title">
[**Gorilla.sc**](https://outlook.office.com/book/PsychTechWrexham@MAILGLYNDWRAC.onmicrosoft.com/?ismsaljsauthenabled)
</h3>
<p>Use [Gorilla.sc](https://gorilla.sc/) for your disseration/module project for creating online experiments.</p>
<img src="../images/gorilla-icon-teal.png" 
     alt="PsyTech Icon" 
     style="width: 160px; 
            display: block;
            margin-top: 60px;
            margin-left: 100px; 
            margin-bottom: 0.2rem;">
:::
::::
:::: card
::: card-body
<h3 class="card-title">
[**SONA - Recruitment Page**](Students/SONA/index.qmd)
</h3>
<p>(<b>CURRENTLY IN-DEVELOPMENT</b>). Learn what you can do on this page to get as many participants as possible for your dissertation project in your final year.</p>
<img src="../images/sona-image.png" 
     alt="sona logo" 
     style="width: 130px; 
            display: block; 
            margin-left: 105px; 
            margin-bottom: 0.2rem;">
:::
::::
:::: card
::: card-body
<h3 class="card-title">
[**Panopto**](https://www.panopto.com/)
</h3>
<p>Use panopto to begin your video recording for your interviews/focus groups.</p>
<img src="../images/panopto.png" 
     alt="PsyTech Icon" 
     style="width: 370px; 
            display: block;
            margin-top: 70px;
            margin-left: 0px; 
            margin-bottom: 0.2rem;">
:::
::::
:::: card
::: card-body
<h3 class="card-title">
[**JISC**](https://app.onlinesurveys.jisc.ac.uk/login?)
</h3>
<p>Start collecting psychometric data using questionnaires on JISC Online Surveys!</p>
<img src="../images/jisc-teal.png" 
     alt="PsyTech Icon" 
     style="width: 160px; 
            display: block; 
            margin-left: 100px; 
            margin-bottom: 0.2rem;">

:::
::::
:::: card
::: card-body
<h3 class="card-title">
[**GitHub**](https://github.com/WU-Psychology-Technician)
</h3>
<p>Learn what we have in our open source repositories for what we use across our modules and open days.</p>
<img src="../images/github-teal.png" 
     alt="PsyTech Icon" 
     style="width: 160px; 
            display: block; 
            margin-left: 100px; 
            margin-bottom: 0.2rem;">
